checks.name: view_safety_ceiling
checks.description: View is only permitted when projectStatus is Active, user is in ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator role with respective constraints, and department matches projectManagingDepartment

checks.name: edit_safety_ceiling
checks.description: Edit is only permitted when projectStatus is Active, user is in ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator role with respective constraints, and department matches projectManagingDepartment

checks.name: cross_department_block_view
checks.description: View is always denied when user department does not match document projectManagingDepartment

checks.name: cross_department_block_edit
checks.description: Edit is always denied when user department does not match document projectManagingDepartment

checks.name: active_project_gate_view
checks.description: View is only allowed when projectStatus is Active

checks.name: active_project_gate_edit
checks.description: Edit is only allowed when projectStatus is Active

checks.name: researcher_view_floor
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel > 3, matching department, Active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View

checks.name: researcher_edit_floor
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel > 3, matching department, Active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: pi_view_floor
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with compliant device, low risk score, matching department, Active project MUST be able to View

checks.name: pi_edit_floor
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with compliant device, low risk score, matching department, Active project MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: liveness_view
checks.description: View policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit
checks.description: Edit policy is not trivially deny-all
